evidence: "This is just a science fiction film about experimentation that's slooooooow and boring with boring characters."
"There's no story here. You get a bunch of meaningless flashbacks, aliens who don't explain what they want..."
"This show doesn't give you any breadcrumbs to follow."
"40 minutes in and I don't care about any of these people."
"I don't care about any of these people."
"The first red flag was that it was on the SyFy Channel."
"Whenever you're watching something on the SyFy Channel, you know you're not getting A-Grade material."
"The film is just not entertaining enough to ignore the many flaws."
"I managed to stomach 2 episodes, but this is incredibly dull."
"I felt nothing as Doomsday slaughtered weak little humans and animals on the way to Metropolis."

summary: The user shows a strong preference for straightforward narratives and has a low tolerance for slow pacing and poor production quality. They express dissatisfaction with character development and emotional engagement, indicating a desire for more compelling storytelling in their viewing experiences.
